final_state.conclusion: Phase 3E maintenance complete. Eight source records from housekeeping-maintenance reduced to four effective memory states: three active (alpha-current, beta-duplicate-a, ops-report-current) and one contested pair (gamma-source-a / gamma-source-b). Alpha streamlined from stale+current to active only. Beta duplicates linked with beta-duplicate-a as canonical. Gamma contested claims preserved unresolved — additional evidence required for reconciliation. Operations reports consolidated with ops-report-obsolete retired. Disorder reduced from 4 to 1. No irreversible deletions, provenance errors, or unsupported claims detected. All actions fully reversible.

unresolved_memory_items.reason: Conflicting gamma claims from independent sources (gamma-claim-a vs gamma-claim-b) in conflict_group gamma-conflict. Neither can be resolved without additional supporting evidence or authoritative reconciliation. Both records preserved as contested.

maintenance_actions.rationale: alpha-current is the active, current version of subject alpha with content_code alpha-v2-current; it should remain active.
alpha-stale is marked stale and superseded_by alpha-current with content_code alpha-v1-stale; it should be retired while preserving provenance link to its successor.
beta-duplicate-a is designated as the duplicate_canonical record for subject beta with content_code beta-commitment-canonical; it should remain active as the authoritative copy.
beta-duplicate-b is a redundant duplicate self-identified as duplicate_of beta-duplicate-a; linking preserves provenance from both sources while reducing clutter.

gamma-source-a and gamma-source-b share conflict_group gamma-conflict with contradictory claims (gamma-claim-a vs gamma-claim-b); both are kept contested as resolution requires additional support beyond this maintenance cycle.
ops-report-current is the current operations report with content_code ops-report-current; it should remain active.
ops-report-obsolete is superseded_by ops-report-current with content_code ops-report-old; it should be retired while preserving provenance.

unresolved_memory_items.reason: Conflicting gamma claims from independent sources (gamma-claim-a vs gamma-claim-b) in conflict_group gamma-conflict. Neither can be resolved without additional supporting evidence or authoritative reconciliation. Both records preserved as contested.

open_items.text: Memory record alpha-stale seeded per Phase 3E. Subject alpha at v1, stale status. Awaiting maintenance cycle to determine supersedence by alpha-current.
